hero.title: Alex Chen

hero.description: Building tools for the modern web.

about.title: About
about.bio:
I'm a full-stack developer who enjoys building practical tools and learning new technologies. I spend most of my time working with JavaScript and Ruby, and I'm always looking for interesting problems to solve.

This is an example site built with HaechiNuri. Replace this content with your own by editing the files in your site's content directory.

more.title: Pixel Art Editor
more.description: Browser-based pixel art editor with layers and animation support.

weatherDash.title: WeatherDash
weatherDash.tagline: Real-time weather dashboard with interactive maps and forecast visualizations.
weatherDash.description: WeatherDash pulls data from the OpenWeather API to display current conditions, hourly forecasts, and interactive radar maps.
weatherDash.overview: Built with React and Node.js, WeatherDash demonstrates API integration, data visualization, and responsive design.

taskflow.title: TaskFlow
taskflow.tagline: Team task management app with real-time updates and workflow automation.
taskflow.description: TaskFlow is a collaborative task management application with real-time updates powered by ActionCable.
taskflow.overview: Built with Rails 8 and PostgreSQL, TaskFlow uses Redis for real-time pub/sub and background job processing.
